tagline: Bespoke goldsmith · one commission per week
concept: A single-goldsmith bespoke jewelry atelier. The WebGL shader hero is the metal being poured in the workshop — signet rings, wedding bands, small heirloom objects cast one piece at a time.

meta.title: Ingot Atelier — Bespoke Goldsmith, Kraków
meta.description: A one-goldsmith bespoke jewelry atelier in Kraków. Signet rings, wedding bands, and small cast objects — one commission per week, by consultation.

voice.agentGreeting: Marek at the atelier. What piece did you have in mind?
